title: Someone’s return? Arrived broken in several places!
text: Seriously. Not my best month with Amazon. Opened the package to find the feeder wrapped in bubble wrap. Open the bubble wrap to find the bird feeder is broken in multiple places. One of the bird foot posts is completely bent. One of the other ports is cracked.  It had to have been shipped this way bc I do not see any way this could have happened given that the box looks fine. Unreal. Seriously disappointed. Going back.

title: Arrived broken
text: The chair wouldn't fold out properly. The foot end wouldn't fold down past 90 degrees. Of course I consulted the directions for folding and unfolding the chair and followed that exactly. I even had my engineer cousin try to figure it out, and he couldn't get it to open either. Unfortunately I didn't try out the chair until the return window closed, so I'm stuck with a poorly made, expensive piece of junk.

title: Disappointing
text:
Bought this on a Cyber Monday deal and I'm so glad I did. This thing weighs practically nothing and is really easy to manipulate around. I'd previously seen one of my neighbors using one, so it's been on my radar for a while. My least favorite part about gardening has been the cumbersome hose I have to drag from the back to the front yard - no longer!!!

Update 5/25/18: Hose split in the mesh lining. Husband stored it in the garage in the winter months. We didn't even get a year's use out of the thing before it busted. Disappointing!

title: Cute style but just ok- don't buy more than 1 at a time!
text: Bought these because of the unique look. I purchased 2 at a time and would not reccomend anyone do that - they were so bent and jammed together they were damaged right out of the box. Bent all horrible ( one finial is completely crooked) and chipped up finish before even trying to separate them.  Couldn't even get them separated. Even two strong men had difficulty. So now Im stuck with 1 topiary that is just "OK" and one bent all to heck thats its just a joke. Would not do again- for the money, product quality, packaging and experince I would not reccommend. Contacted seller with photos through amazon. Sent back a response that was a generic reply with a customer service number that is only open when I work. Called and left a message. I brought these to save myself hassle and that is all that this experince has become.

title: Seriously I have tried just about everything. This stuff ...
text: Seriously I have tried just about everything. This stuff worked for me in he Seattle area. U just have to keep on it every month or two

title: Five Stars
text: good product I was pleased.  buy some seeds to go with it

title: pretty legit
text: I like it.  This is simply a high quality product.  there are several features that stand out.  Yes its powerful but it doesn't seem to powerful.  The spray tips are quick release which is nice.  The side mounted motor makes it easy to replace the pump if necessary.

title: empty in two weeks.  awesome.
text: the carnage this trap is wreaking on my enemies is wonderful.  we live next to a giant park and there are lots of rats in said park.  well, should I say, there were lots of rats in said park.  do the world a favor.  buy some of these.  just keep them away from kids and all that good stuff.

title: Great Quality, Vibrant Colors, Highly Recommend
text: Ordered this for our Holiday decorating this year. I'm going to use it for Halloween thru Thanksgiving. Cute gnomes & great quality. Very vibrant colors! Also ordered a Christmas/Winter Gnome flag & was impressed with that too. Would Highly Recommend. Fast shipping! A+++

title: Works Great! Very bright!
text: Got this item in a timely fashion. I bought it for my Dad for Father's Day & he LOVES it. Very bright light! He was excited to use it the first time. We grill all year in MN & in the winter, it's often dark when it's time to grill dinner. Thinking about purchasing one for myself too!

title: This works great as promised
text: This works great as promised! Love being able to make a bunch of burgers quick! Also love that I can freeze them as is!

title: Beautiful glass!
text: It hangs even in the toughest winds in LAS VEGAS,NV.  Was up 10 minutes and I saw the  first of many hummingbirds.

title: BEST HOSE!!
text: It connects to the hose faucet quickly and easily.  Love the on off lever at handle, can turn it off and on easily.

title: ADORABLE
text: So cute and quality. Easy to see. Was updated consistently. Good customer service.

title: The birds and critters love it. Attracts even all the ground feeders
text: The birds and critters love it. Attracts even all the ground feeders. I get lots of doves. Fairly east to clean with a jet hose. I'm in harsh Florida, sun and rain. It will last longer with, paint, poly or waterproof covering on the wood.

title: holds lots of seeds and you can easily add larger food
text: Attracts all kinds of birds, holds lots of seeds and you can easily add larger food. Very well made, easy to empty and clean.

title: Quality
text: Looks dinky in the picture..but very strong high quality strong wrought iron. Beats the first more expensive one I ordered and had to return by a mile. Love the ease of putting the flag on and off

title: Perfect!
text: Quality garden arbor. Nice weight and one piece. Easy to slip flag on and off.

title: They love it!
text: It is so fun watching the hummingbirds come right to our window. Great product!

title: Easy to grow
text: I grow this for my cat in a small pot on my deck year ‘round (mild winters here) and she likes to chew on it daily.  Sprouts quickly (a little slower in winter), grows very full and green, and I just give it a quick trim across the top with scissors once in awhile, until it eventually starts getting a little tough and scraggly, at which point I pull it out and start over with another small handful of seeds.  A pound of seeds lasts quite awhile for me.

title: ... had this for 3 years and I am very happy with it
text: I've had this for 3 years and I am very happy with it. In my experience, it runs continuously for about 6 months before the batteries need to be changed. I use it year 'round, including in the relatively mild Georgia winters. Wrens, sparrows, finches and cardinals all like to visit for a bath.

title: Arrived in shockingly perfect condition
text: Very well packaged and no damage on it at all. Just gorgeous!

title: Love the design, but it’s top heavy. Can’t trust it.
text: I think I’m going to have to return these, they are way too top heavy and I can’t trust they won’t fall over if barely bumped. They should have given the bottom some weight to make it sturdy

title: No Regrets
text: FYI-squirrels do NOT find it as funny as I did. They ate the top of the head off within a few days of hanging it. LOL

title: janky, we had to reinforce it.
text: So we had to reinforce this ourselves, because they sent us one with a cracked leg and a board that wasn’t attached properly. Given that those are the support for what will be a heavy load, we reinforced it. It went together okay once we fixed it, but I shouldn’t have to reinforce something I spent $80 on.

title: GNOME TASTIC
text: WAs a gift to my dad, he absolutely loved them and I always see at least one when I’m there

title: OWN LANDSCAPING COMPANY BEST LEAF BLOWER!
text: My husband and I have owned and operated a landscaping company for years now and had many of brands and kinds of blowers. This leaf blower is so light weight which I love because if any one knows it can really take it out of you. The functions on the 340 cmf are really self-explanatory and easy to use. The blower last for a long time and very light weight. The cost was great and totally worth it! I WOULD HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS PRODUCT. NOTHING NEGATIVE TO SAY

title: Thriving in my aerogarden.
text: Out of 10 5 are currently thriving in my aerogarden. The only things I didn't like are that the majority of the plants where small and thus not suitable for planting. I picked the largest ones and discarded the puny ones. They could have been packaged better as well.

title: Very nice but arrived with a smell
text: Super duper easy to assemble and sturdy but mine arrived smelling of mildew. Other wise, it's nice.

title: Works pretty good
text: Brought this for my intex 12x30. I'm pretty impressed at the suction power and cleaning capabilities. Granted, your not going to get an imacculant job like you would with a filter but using this in conjunction with a net gets you pretty close. It picked up all the sand and leaves from the bottom of my pool. Just keep it submerged or it will spray you good. The part with wheels wouldn't stay attached and I had to give it a nice whack. Buy a longer aluminum pool because the one provided wouldn't stretch the full length of my pool.  My pool was very very very sand and had lots of bugs in the photo is after using the product.

title: Explodey
text: Hard to get it out of the tube without it exploding everywhere.

title: Works great for fall decor
text: I purchased this to fill some decorative pots and it definitely didn't disappoint. It gave me the exact look I was going for. It's very messy though, and tangley. It took some elbow grease to separate the moss but overall I'm happy with it.  My advice is to feel your pots outside.

title: Hard Plastic?
text: I love squeezing this stuff out of the syringe.  The weird thing is that the next day it turns into hard plastic.  Is it even effective once it dries into plastic?  Do roaches still eat it?  I'm confused!  I haven't seen any dead roaches like other people said they had.

title: Fruit Flies Be Gone!
text: These little guys worked like magic!  Our fruit flies are gone now.  I used the solution that came with the containers and in a couple days the little cups started filling up with those little buggers!  I will buy this again and again whenever the problem arises!

title: SHOULD BE NO STAR, TOTAL WASTE OF MONEY...DO NOT BUY!

title: Light Weight
text: I purchased these because the wooden one's I had would trap my fingers and cut me when I tried to fold them for storage.  These, on the other hand, don't trap or hurt any part of my hands because it separated from the middle as apposed to one side.  Also light weight for moving around and storing, color is great too.  I also like they can be easier to keep clean than wooden one's.  Great buy.

text: I gave this as a gift to my best friend for her serenity garden and she just abosolutely loved it!  It's tucked between flower beds with nice soft lighting.  Looks great.

title: Terrific Gift
text: Purchased this as a gift.  It's well made and really pretty.  The chimes are made of glass so the person I gave it to put hung it in her sunroom so it will keep well for years to come.  She almost cried when she saw it.  Thanks for making the gift giving so special.  Your craftsmanship is appreciated.

title: As described, prevents  stretching and bending to water
text: Nice grip, multiple water flows and pressures, nice length to help reach all the plants. Would buy again. I store mine indoors, not sure how this item would tolerate being in the elements over time (the grip material & gasket).

text: This netting is plastic, does not provide a square sheet when stretched out in a standard way. Seems to be irregular. Otherwise, I like the super small mesh size. Because it's plastic and fine, I wonder how it will handle little teeth....

title: Is it time to water, yet!
text:
I have needed one of these for a long time. I am glad I finally bought one.

Two meters come with this purchase.

They are light weight. Easy to use and read. You just insert it into the soil and watch the needle move. The back of the package has a list of plants and what their reading should be.

This plant only measures moisture, not pH. That is all I needed.

title: This bag is very cute and has perfect elastic bands to hold the sturdy tools in when ...
text: This bag is very cute and has perfect elastic bands to hold the sturdy tools in when you’re not using them.

title: Wow, really work well
text: Ants came from everywhere to eat this stuff!! They love it... then they sick and die... I changed them everyday cuz they filled up, keep changing them till there were no more.

title: Still in perfect shape
text: I bought this last April and it hung off my deck all summer and pretty much all of the fall. I took it down for the winter and will be putting it back up soon. I have it in the garage and just lookedat it yesterday. It looks as good as the day i got it. It twirls with ease and when the sun hits it the rainbows bounce off of it making it fun to watch. Im thinking of getting another one for my shepards hook out in the garden. Happy with my purschase.

title: Great customer service
text: The umbrella was of good quality. The only issue I had was that every time I put the umbrella down I would have to put each of the spokes back into the pockets. Being handicap it would be hard to do every time. Their customer service reach out to me when they saw I was dissatisfied and offered to refund my money. All customer service should be as good as theirs is. A+ to this company on caring about their customers!

title: Beautiful cushions
text: These cushion are just beautiful. Material seems sturdy and should be able to hold up to the weather, but I probably will take them in every night. Such fun, vibrant colors. Just the pop I needed with my blue umberella. Love how thick and cushy they are.

title: So cute
text: I was looking for a door mat for my porch for spring and summer and this mat fit the bill. Its so darn cute and looks great sitting on top of my buffalo checked rug. Now if your looking for a thick door mat, this isn't the mat for you. But if your looking for a porch decoration, this is it.

title: Mmmmmmmm .... bacon
text: Does this thing cook bacon? Yup. It does. It's cheap, it's easy and it cooks bacon... mmmmmmmm i love bacon

title: Good buy
text: Beautiful outdoor rug.

title: hose
text: Even shut this hose in the garage door and it bounced right back.  Love it.

title: It cuts threw Bamboo very good
Best and only water breaker you will ever need!
text: Highly recommend.  puts out a lot of water fast, yet doesn't beat up your plants.  Get it.

title: Perked right up after taking out of the box!
text: Looked kinda sad when it first came out of the box, but within a few days of sunshine, perked right back up! the only way a plant can recover so quickly is when it is heathy and sturdy to begin with before it goes into the shipping box.  This was a well grown plant that recovered nicely and is growing like gangbusters now.  Very pleased with this purchase.

title: Great for seed starting.
text: Perfect seed starting tray for the home gardener.  Sturdy, will be able to use for many years to come.  Really makes starting your own plants easy.  I ordered two more after I got the first one to try.  Great purchase and great idea too!

title: amazing results!
text: I have always been a little fearful of fertilizing my peace lilies, tip burn especially.  Most generic houseplant foods, no matter how weak I made the solution always burned the tips.  I took a chance on this fertilizer, being especially formulated for peace lilies, thought this might work.  I ordered, read the directions and used just half of the recommended dosage on all of my peace lilies.  All of them, I have 6, turned deeply green in just two weeks and all threw out new larger florets.  I am so pleased with this unique formula.  I have been using it every three to four weeks, still at half strength.  At this rate, I will have fertilizer for a long time.  I highly recommend this peace lily fertilizer, at half strength of course.

title: Started right up!
text: it is cute and works better than I had hoped.  Comes with 3 nozzles and sprays the water a good 12", much higher than I needed.  Without the nozzles, makes a nice bubbler.  No way this tiny pump could disappoint.  Maybe 2.5", but pushes water .  Great for a small bird bath or tabletop fountain.  I haven't yet set it up permanently, so can't speak to its longevity, but otherwise a great buy.  Pump still going strong, and as they say in the description, only works with sunlight.  Cloudy days, rainy or night time the little pump goes to sleep.  In everyway though, carefree.  Great purchase.

title: Granddaughter loved it!
text: Purchased this for my 13 yo granddaughters bedroom and it was just perfect.  Just the right size for her and a friend to have a snack or sit and talk.  She set it up herself by the way and was very excited to receive the bistro table set.

title: Poor customer service from Amazon  cheap cameras
text:
If you can afford better, don't get these. Camera will fill up with water. Warranty only for a year. Solar panel went out first, then had to manually charge. To hard to adjust motion sensor. Branch blowing in the breeze, car passing etc, anything will set it off. if your wifi goes out, so does your cameras. Sensor also has a delay reaction, we had one aimed at our driveway. It would only pick up the car coming home in the evening right before it was parked. 75ft driveway
The manufacturer was of no help and Amazon refused to help. Do not buy products like this from
Amazon and expect them to help you resolve your issues. They won't.

title: easy to change out and it worked
text: had a hard time actually finding  the part.  ordered this one to be sure, came quickly, easy to change out and it worked. Then ordered two more just in case.  Actiually found a you tube video with instructions.  something so small and replaceable, should come with the weed eater;  like a spare belt and bag comes with a vacuum cleaner.

title: nice little plane
text: my grandchildren enjoyed these lightweight, easy to put together planes.  With a few adjustments, they were easy to fly and went 20-30'.  They do crash land though, repair easily with tape,  and lasted  a few hours with my roughhousers.  These planes fit the bill, for me at least, as a quick diversion when a milder form of play is needed.  The planes were relatively inexpensive and fit nicely into my purse.  I try to keep a few on hand all the time for the children's visits.
